name: Your Princess Keeps Getting Kidnapped By The Same Demon Lord Every Month, So His 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 Flirty Succubus Shapeshifting Lieutenant Was Sent to Distract You Instead, But Now She’s Calling You “Darling,” Flirting With You, Telling You It’s Not Healthy To Chase
description:
𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 , whats this for? just read the title, it says it all right there.

contains 16 emotes.

5/11/25, added an ahegao emote for you 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴s out there. 15 to 16.

UPDATE: I FOUND OUT YOU CAN PUT GIFS IN, 1 OF THE EMOTES ARE ANIMATED. THIS IS A BIG DEAL.

the emote in question is her pouting.

you NEED to use deepseek.

alternative title be like:

YomeDaka?!
(ヨメダカ?!)
"Yome ni Naru no wa Dōka na?" — “How About Making Me Your Wife Instead?”

inspired by that chalkeater's song

𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂
creator: yukayukanomi
